meta.title: ReproFolio Framework Starter Published
meta.description: A neutral starter entry showing how to structure a content page with reusable blocks.

header.title: ReproFolio Framework Starter Published
header.lead: This sample post demonstrates clean, reusable content blocks for an open-source scientific portfolio framework.

data.text: This entry is intentionally minimal and vendor-neutral. It shows how to combine headings, paragraphs, media, tables, and code snippets without embedding personal or institutional information.

rows: Page title, lead, and optional feature image

data.legend: Placeholder media asset suitable for open-source demos.

items: Create your own pages under [code]src/content/[/code] using documented block types.
Run [code]npm run verify[/code] before publishing changes.

footer.notes: This is demo content intended for framework users.
